message:
Add Node.js crypto module with createHash and createHmac

- Add native __edgebox_hash and __edgebox_hmac Zig functions
- Support SHA-256, SHA-384, SHA-512, SHA-1, and MD5 hash algorithms
- Support HMAC-SHA256, HMAC-SHA384, HMAC-SHA512 for message authentication
- Implement full crypto module with randomBytes, randomUUID, getHashes
- Both hex and base64 digest encodings supported
